p3.title: Weighted-ledger entry for RP00.P02.M08.S01 is relied upon but not present in this diff
p3.issue: Validation asserts the weighted ledger contains M08.S01 with sourceMicroPhaseId=RP00.P02.M08, terminal=false, nextSubphaseId=RP00.P02.M08.S02, but the diff adds no weighted-ledger record. Correctness depends on the ledger being pre-seeded elsewhere in control-plane-contract.json.
p3.recommendation: No action required if the ledger is pre-seeded. The local validate run reporting only the missing-evidence-file failure confirms these ledger checks already pass; treat as informational confirmation.

p3.title: Validator coverage of scope_policy is a subset; a few negation flags are unchecked at the contract-JSON layer
p3.issue: scope_policy.does_not_mutate_entity_registry, does_not_replace_human_approval, does_not_replace_H00_or_C00, and no_real_data are present in the contract JSON but not individually asserted by the script's scope_policy loop. (The canonical policy object's doesNotMutateEntityRegistry/doesNotReplaceHumanApproval ARE enforced by assertControlPlaneHermesEvidencePacketServiceEntrypointContract, so the safety-critical flags remain gated.)
p3.recommendation: Optional hygiene: extend the scope_policy loop to cover the remaining negation flags for full defense-in-depth parity. Non-blocking and consistent with prior packs' subset checks.

p3.title: Minor metadata redundancy
p3.issue: no_real_data appears both at the definition top level and inside scope_policy; writes_product_state likewise duplicated. Harmless and internally consistent, mirrors prior subphase definitions.
p3.recommendation: No change needed; noted for awareness only.

boundary_checks.evidence: Only frozen literal constants, a pure assert (no I/O), and a getter that returns the constant; doesNotExecuteServiceLogic/doesNotCreateRuntimeRoute=true and asserted.
doesNotRunHermesValidation, doesNotCreateHermesEvidence, doesNotExecuteHermesRuntime all true and enforced in validators.js flag loop.
writesProductState=false; doesNotWriteDatabase/doesNotWriteStorage/doesNotPersistProductState=true and asserted; no fs-write/network/process calls in diff.
noRealData=true; fixture_integrity declares synthetic_only/deterministic/no_real_client_data/no_real_matter_data/no_credentials_or_secrets and is verified by script + test.
doesNotReplaceHumanApproval=true (asserted), scope_policy.does_not_replace_H00_or_C00=true, human_approval_boundary_context present in context ids.
All values are frozen literals; no Date/random/ordering nondeterminism; deterministic=true asserted.
nextSubphase=RP00.P02.M08.S02 everywhere; completesSourceMicroPhase=false; scope_policy does_not_complete_RP00_P02_M08/_P02/does_not_close_RP00=true; weighted boundary terminal=false.

boundary_checks.check: upstream dependency on RP00.P02.M07.S20 denied-path closeout
boundary_checks.evidence: upstream refs RP00.P02.M07.S20 / RP00.P02.M07; requiredClosedSubphases now includes S16–S20 (idempotent push); denied_path_proof_ref + required_evidence_refs consistent.

boundary_checks.check: cross-file consistency (contract / policies / service / validators / fixture / test / script)
boundary_checks.evidence: All 8 array contracts (required_evidence_refs, context_ids, schema/command_receipt/evidence_summary/blocked_claim/gate_outcome fields, acceptance_gate_ids, future_subphases) match in content AND order; JSON.stringify and deepEqual comparisons align; required_exports/target_files complete.
no_credentials_or_secrets=true; credential_secret_exclusion_context present; no secrets in diff.
current_subphase advanced to M08.S01/CP00-049; production_ready_requires adds the verified flag; CP00-049 vs docs/closeout-packs/cp00-049 casing consistent throughout.

parsed_review.recommendation: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS — Approve. This is a purely additive, metadata-only service-entrypoint-contract subphase that follows the established M0x.S01 pattern with full validator/test/fixture/script cross-checks and preserves every required boundary (no runtime, no writes, no real data, no Hermes execution, no human-approval replacement, no premature M08/P02/RP00 closure). The only validate-command failure is the expected missing CP00-049 evidence files. Next step: create the docs/closeout-packs/cp00-049 evidence artifacts (construction inspection asserting control_plane_hermes_evidence_packet_service_entrypoint_contract_verified=true, command evidence, adjudication) so npm run rp00:control-plane:validate goes green, then hand off to RP00.P02.M08.S02. P3 items are informational only and need not block this pack.
